info.name: Casbin Project API - Realtime
info.description: Collection for testing WebSocket and Server-Sent Events (SSE) endpoints.

item.name: WebSocket Connection
item.description: Connects to the WebSocket endpoint. Use Postman's built-in WebSocket client to send and receive messages.

item.name: Server-Sent Events (SSE) Endpoint
item.description: Connects to the SSE endpoint. IMPORTANT: Postman's HTTP client is not designed for streaming SSE events in real-time. This request will only show a pending status or a single response after a long delay/timeout. To see the real-time event stream, use curl or a web browser console.
